description_long: This refrigerator features a boxy, utilitarian design with a muted beige front and olive green sides, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance. The front is equipped with two vertical doors on the upper section, each with prominent black handles, and a water or ice dispenser slot on the left door. Below the doors are two large pull-out drawers, also with black handles, likely for freezer or storage compartments. The right door includes a vertical rectangular panel that resembles a digital display or control interface. The rear of the refrigerator has a vented grille and visible stains, suggesting exposure to urban or outdoor environments. The overall finish is matte with some visible wear and grime, indicating frequent use or placement in a public or semi-public urban setting.
description: A rugged, industrial-style refrigerator with beige front, olive green sides, dual doors, two large drawers, and a vertical control panel. The exterior shows signs of wear and features a rear vent grille.
description_view_0: Front view shows two vertical doors with black handles, a water/ice dispenser, a vertical control panel, and two large pull-out drawers.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a plain olive green panel with no visible features except the edge of the front handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a vented grille on the lower left, stains, and a generally flat, utilitarian back surface.
description_view_3: Right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain olive green panel and the side profile of the front handles.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding vertical black handles on both doors and horizontal black handles on drawers, all externally mounted.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Horizontal slats located on the lower left of the rear panel.
